title: OntologyStudioSummary
description: Bounded health and scale summary for Ontology Studio.

totalTerms.description: Number of active glossary terms in scope.

totalRelations.description: Number of active term-to-term relations in scope.

isolatedTerms.description: Number of scoped terms without a term-to-term relation.

connectedPercentage.description: Percentage of scoped terms with at least one term-to-term relation.

paging.description: Offset pagination for the isolated-term preview.
